textPlain: I think it's actually this one, or perhaps a new one after it:https://www.medrxiv.org/content/10.1101/2024.02.19.24301010v...

Published: October 8, 2014More recent work indexed in Google Scholar:
https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=TVozLNoAAAAJ...
That paper is an in vitro demonstration whereas the OP article seems to imply they tested on actual patients?

Hey FYI, this isnt the place for that type of comment.  This isn't Reddit, and we don't want it to become such.Unnuanced, potentially inflammatory quips about a vaguely related current political situation just aren't appropriate here.There are plenty of ways to express the same sentiment without resorting to the type of commentary that is common elsewhere.I encourage you to read the community guidelines for HN.
